# Formix — Design Subscription Landing Page
> Formix is a premium Framer landing page for design subscriptions that helps you launch a client-generating website in minutes. Perfect for solo designers, creative studios, and productized service businesses—designed to qualify leads and book calls fast.

## What We Do
- Services Tailored to Your Mortgage Needs
- How does it all work?
